h1: 9 kg Washer + 6 kg Dryer Combo | Front Load | AI DD™ | Steam | LG ThinQ — Stainless Silver

gallery.a: Front view of LG 9kg Washer + 6kg Dryer Combo in Stainless Silver (WSV0906XM)

modules.head: Intelligent Care with 18% More Fabric Protection
modules.body: Based on big data of accumulated washing experience, AI DD™ delivers the optimised washing motion to care for your laundry — up to 18% more fabric protection compared to standard motion.
modules.disc: *Tested by Intertek. Compared to LG washers with Inverter DirectDrive without AI DD. Results may vary.

imgs.a: AI DD with 18% more fabric protection

modules.head: What is AI DD™?
modules.body: AI DD™ detects not only the weight, but also senses the softness of fabric, and it chooses the optimal wash motions automatically — no manual programme selection required.

imgs.a: How AI DD senses fabric weight and softness

modules.head: Washer and Dryer in One Unit
modules.body: LG's all-in-one washer-dryer combo puts 9kg of wash capacity and 6kg of dry capacity into a single appliance. Save valuable floor space in your home — no second dryer required. From soiled to ready-to-wear in one cycle.

imgs.a: Single unit combining washer and dryer

modules.head: Bigger Capacity in the Same Space
modules.body: 9kg wash / 6kg dry capacity in a compact 600 × 850 × 620 mm body — maximising drum volume without increasing external footprint.

imgs.a: Bigger drum capacity in same external size

modules.head: More Durable and Hygienic
modules.body: Durable, elegant tempered glass door and hygienic Full Stainless Steel drum with a slim stainless lifter — engineered for long-lasting performance and simple cleaning.

imgs.a: Tempered glass door and Full Stainless drum

modules.head: Smart Appliance — Control from Anywhere
modules.body: With LG ThinQ™, your washer-dryer just got smarter. Start cycles remotely, download new wash/dry programs, monitor energy use, and access Smart Diagnosis™ — all via Wi-Fi through your smartphone.
modules.disc: *LG ThinQ™ app available on compatible Android and iOS devices. Wi-Fi connection and product registration required.
